summary: Frontend button CSS class testing completed for Chitrakatha photography website. All custom button classes (btn-primary-red, btn-outline-gold, btn-filter, btn-category, btn-book-red, btn-book-gold, btn-text-link) are correctly applied. Navigation and Book Now modal functionality verified.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@chitrakatha.com / admin123 (not tested - frontend only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All button CSS classes verified. Custom animations defined in index.css (shimmer-sweep, glow-pulse, glow-pulse-gold, border-glow). All buttons have :active scale-down effect for click feedback.

home_page.cta_view_packages: PASS - btn-primary-red class applied with flex items-center space-x-2 group
home_page.cta_explore_gallery: PASS - btn-outline-gold class applied with flex items-center space-x-2
home_page.view_full_gallery: PASS - btn-outline-gold class applied with inline-flex items-center space-x-2
home_page.view_details_links: PASS - 4 links found with btn-text-link class
home_page.view_all_packages: PASS - btn-primary-red class applied with inline-flex items-center space-x-2

gallery_page.filter_all: PASS - btn-filter btn-filter-active classes applied (active by default)
gallery_page.filter_toggle: PASS - clicking filter changes btn-filter-inactive to btn-filter-active

services_page.category_wedding: PASS - btn-category btn-category-active classes applied (active by default)
services_page.category_toggle: PASS - clicking category changes btn-category-inactive to btn-category-active
services_page.book_now_buttons: PASS - 3 btn-book-red buttons and 1 btn-book-gold button found
services_page.book_now_modal: PASS - Modal opens correctly showing Contact Chitrakatha with selected package info

navigation.home_to_gallery: PASS - Explore Gallery button navigates to /gallery
navigation.gallery_to_services: PASS - Services nav link navigates to /services

css_animations_verified.shimmer_sweep: Defined in index.css for btn-primary-red hover effect
css_animations_verified.glow_pulse: Defined in index.css for btn-book-red hover effect
